task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
build for javascript backend
allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@example.com'

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

when user sends user to /api/register:
  validate user:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required, min 8
  saved_user = save user to Users
  send back saved_user with status 201

when user sends creds to /api/login:
  validate creds:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  found_user = look up User with this email
  guard found_user exists or 'User not found'
  guard found_user's password is creds's password or 'Invalid password'
  send back { user is found_user, token is 'authenticated' } with status 200

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is current_user's id
  send back todos

when user sends entry to /api/todos:
  requires login
  validate entry:
    title is text, required
  entry's user_id is current_user's id
  saved_entry = save entry to Todos
  send back saved_entry with status 201
